name: Live device status panel
description: Add a live device status panel to the devices page (web/src/app/devices/page.tsx) showing online/offline status, current network type, is-metered flag, SIM info, free disk, and thermal status -- refreshed every ~5 seconds while the page is open by calling the relevant athena RPC endpoints. If the device is offline, show the last-known values + an 'offline' badge.
acceptance_criteria: Backend adds GET /v1/devices/:dongle_id/live which orchestrates parallel calls over the WebSocket to getNetworkType, getNetworkMetered, getSimInfo, getMessage('deviceState') (for free_space + thermal) -- any subset of missing values returns as null rather than failing the whole call; returns JSON { online, network_type, metered, sim, free_space_gb, thermal_status, fetched_at }
If the device is not connected (no client in the hub), returns { online: false } plus whatever was cached in a 5-minute in-memory cache from the last successful call
web/src/components/DeviceStatusPanel.tsx polls the endpoint every 5s while mounted (cleared on unmount); shows a colored online-dot plus the values
Handles the offline case gracefully (grayed-out card, 'last seen' timestamp)
Backend handler test + handler unit test covering offline and partial-failure cases
pnpm --dir web lint, type-check, build pass
